data.biography:
He co-starred as Quintus in Ridley Scott's Gladiator (2000), the Dreamworks-Universal movie and winner of five Oscars, including Best Picture, co-starring Russell Crowe, Joaquin Phoenix, Connie Nielsen, Richard Harris, Derek Jacobi, and Oliver Reed. Three of Tomas Arana's more recent films are: La volpe a tre zampe (2005), directed by Sandro Dionisio, a Teatri Uniti (Angelo Curti)/Cattelya Production that co-stars Miranda Otto, Angela Luce, and Nadja Uhl; Outpatient (2002), directed by Alec Carlin, with Justin Kirk and Catherine Kellner and the Jean-Claude Van Damme action film, Derailed (2002), directed by Bob Misiorowski. He was in Chimera (2001), directed by Pappi Corsicato, with Iaia Forte and Tommaso Ragno. He has appeared in more than 40 films, ranging from large budget Hollywood Studio pictures to Independent films in both the U.S. and Europe. His studio pictures include L.A. Confidential (1997) (as Bruening, a rogue cop), The Bodyguard (1992) (as Portman, Kevin Costner's antagonist and Whitney Houston's assassin), The Hunt for Red October (1990) (as Loginov, the Russian Saboteur), Tombstone (1993), and First Kid (1996).

He played Lazarus in Martin Scorsese's controversial The Last Temptation of Christ (1988). He was also featured in the Sundance-developed Wildflowers (1999), an independent film by Melissa Painter starring Clea DuVall and Daryl Hannah. Arana has played leading and supporting roles in over 30 European productions including films by directors such as Lina Wertmüller, Liliana Cavani, Carlo Verdone, Michele Soavi and with one of Japan's most successful directors: Koreyoshi Kurahara in the Toho production See You (1988). In theatre, Arana was the producer as well as a leading actor in the internationally acclaimed Theatre Company Falso Movimento, based in Naples, Italy. Under Arana and the artistic director Mario Martone (now a major Italian Film Director), Falso Movimento won many awards including Best Play of the Year, Best Set Design and the prestigious Mondello Prize. The company toured worldwide for more than nine years at major International Festivals including London, Frankfurt, New York, Los Angeles, Madrid, Barcelona, Copenhagen, Stockholm, Jerusalem, and others. Tomas Arana grew up in San Francisco and studied classical theatre at its prestigious American Conservatory Theatre, afterwards relocating to New York and acting in off-Broadway productions. He then hitchhiked throughout Europe and ended up living in Naples, Italy, where he worked in the Lucio Amelio Art Gallery, working with such artists as Warhol, Rauschenberg, Beuys, Richter, Longobardi, Clemente, Gilbert & George, etc. Andy Warhol painted his portrait, which is now part of his extensive art collection. He has both U.S. and Italian citizenship. He is married and has two sons.

IMDb Mini Biography By: anonymous
data.name: Tomas Arana

data.biography:
他在雷德利·斯科特的《角斗士》（2000 年）中共同主演昆图斯，这是梦工厂-环球电影，并获得了五项奥斯卡奖，包括最佳影片，由罗素·克劳、华金·菲尼克斯、康妮·尼尔森、理查德·哈里斯、德里克·雅各比和奥利弗·里德联合主演。托马斯·阿拉纳最近的三部电影是：由桑德罗·迪奥尼西奥执导的《La volpe a tre zampe》（2005 年），由 Teatri Uniti （Angelo Curti）/Cattelya Production 联合主演，由米兰达·奥托、安吉拉·卢斯和娜佳·乌尔联合主演;《门诊》（2002 年），由亚历克·卡林执导，贾斯汀·柯克和凯瑟琳·凯尔纳主演，让-克劳德·范·达姆动作片《脱轨》（2002 年），由鲍勃·米西奥罗夫斯基执导。他曾在《奇美拉》（2001）中，由帕皮·科西卡托（Pappi Corsicato）执导，伊亚·福特（Iaia Forte）和托马索·拉格诺（Tommaso Ragno）合作。他出演了 40 多部电影，从好莱坞制片厂的大预算电影到美国和欧洲的独立电影。他的工作室照片包括《洛杉矶机密》（1997）（饰演流氓警察布鲁宁）、《保镖》（1992）（饰演波特曼，凯文·科斯特纳的对手和惠特尼·休斯顿的刺客）、《追捕红色十月》（1990）（饰演俄罗斯破坏者洛金诺夫）、《墓碑》（1993）和《第一个孩子》（1996）。

他在马丁·斯科塞斯（Martin Scorsese）备受争议的《基督的最后诱惑》（The Last Temptation of Christ，1988）中扮演拉撒路。他还出演了圣丹斯开发的《野花》（1999），这是一部由梅丽莎·佩因特（Melissa Painter）执导的独立电影，由克莱亚·杜瓦尔（Clea DuVall）和达里尔·汉娜（Daryl Hannah）主演。Arana 曾在 30 多部欧洲作品中担任主角和配角，包括 Lina Wertmüller、Liliana Cavani、Carlo Verdone、Michele Soavi 等导演的电影，以及与日本最成功的导演之一：Koreyoshi Kurahara 在东宝制作的 See You （1988） 中合作。在戏剧方面，阿拉纳是位于意大利那不勒斯的国际知名剧团Falso Movimento的制片人和主要演员。在阿拉纳和艺术总监马里奥·马托内（Mario Martone，现为意大利主要电影导演）的领导下，《Falso Movimento》赢得了许多奖项，包括年度最佳戏剧、最佳布景设计和著名的蒙德罗奖。九年多来，乐团在伦敦、法兰克福、纽约、洛杉矶、马德里、巴塞罗那、哥本哈根、斯德哥尔摩、耶路撒冷等主要国际艺术节上巡回演出。托马斯·阿拉纳（Tomas Arana）在旧金山长大，在著名的美国音乐学院剧院学习古典戏剧，后来移居纽约并在非百老汇作品中表演。然后，他在整个欧洲搭便车，最终住在意大利那不勒斯，在那里他在卢西奥·阿梅里奥美术馆工作，与沃霍尔，劳森伯格，博伊斯，里希特，隆戈巴迪，克莱门特，吉尔伯特和乔治等艺术家合作。他拥有美国和意大利公民身份。他已婚，有两个儿子。
data.name: 托马斯·阿拉纳

data.biography:
他在雷德利·斯科特的《帝國驕雄》（2000 年）中共同主演昆圖斯，這是夢工廠 - 環球電影，並獲得了五項奧斯卡獎，包括最佳影片，由羅素·克勞、華金·菲尼克斯、康妮·尼爾森、理查德·哈里斯、德里克·雅各比和奧利弗·里德聯合主演。託馬斯·阿拉納最近的三部電影是：由桑德羅·迪奧尼西奧執導的《La volpe a tre zampe》（2005 年），由 Teatri Uniti （Angelo Curti）/Cattelya Production 聯合主演，由米蘭達·奧託、安吉拉·盧斯和娜佳·烏爾聯合主演; 《門診》（2002 年），由亞歷克·卡林執導，賈斯汀·柯克和凱瑟琳·凱爾納主演，讓 - 克勞德·範·達姆動作片《脱軌》（2002 年），由鮑勃·米西奧羅夫斯基執導。他曾在《盜墓奇美拉》（2001）中，由帕皮·科西卡託（Pappi Corsicato）執導，伊亞·福特（Iaia Forte）和託馬索·拉格諾（Tommaso Ragno）合作。他出演了 40 多部電影，從好萊塢製片廠的大預算電影到美國和歐洲的獨立電影。他的工作室照片包括《洛杉磯機密》（1997）（飾演流氓警察布魯寧）、《護花傾情》（1992）（飾演波特曼，凱文·科斯特納的對手和惠特尼·休斯頓的刺客）、《追捕紅色十月》（1990）（飾演俄羅斯破壞者洛金諾夫）、《墓碑》（1993）和《第一個孩子》（1996）。

他在馬丁·斯科塞斯（Martin Scorsese）備受爭議的《基督的最後誘惑》（The Last Temptation of Christ，1988）中扮演拉撒路。他還出演了聖丹斯開發的《野花》（1999），這是一部由梅麗莎·佩因特（Melissa Painter）執導的獨立電影，由克萊亞·杜瓦爾（Clea DuVall）和達里爾·漢娜（Daryl Hannah）主演。Arana 曾在 30 多部歐洲作品中擔任主角和配角，包括 Lina Wertmüller、Liliana Cavani、Carlo Verdone、Michele Soavi 等導演的電影，以及與日本最成功的導演之一：Koreyoshi Kurahara 在東寶製作的 See You （1988） 中合作。在戲劇方面，阿拉納是位於義大利那不勒斯的國際知名劇團 Falso Movimento 的製片人和主要演員。在阿拉納和藝術總監馬里奧·馬託內（Mario Martone，現為義大利主要電影導演）的領導下，《Falso Movimento》贏得了許多獎項，包括年度最佳戲劇、最佳佈景設計和著名的蒙德羅獎。九年多來，樂團在倫敦、法蘭克福、紐約、洛杉磯、馬德裏、巴塞羅那、哥本哈根、斯德哥爾摩、耶路撒冷等主要國際藝術節上巡迴演出。託馬斯·阿拉納（Tomas Arana）在舊金山長大，在著名的美國音樂學院劇院學習古典戲劇，後來移居紐約並在非百老匯作品中表演。然後，他在整個歐洲搭便車，最終住在義大利那不勒斯，在那裏他在盧西奧·阿梅里奧美術館工作，與沃霍爾，勞森伯格，博伊斯，裏希特，隆戈巴迪，克萊門特，吉爾伯特和喬治等藝術家合作。他擁有美國和義大利公民身份。他已婚，有兩個兒子。
data.name: 託馬斯·阿拉納

data.biography:
Brumpton has performed in over 60 short films including the 2006 Tropfest finalist - Silencer.

Last Ride and The Loved Ones screened in competition at the 2009 Toronto International Film Festival, where The Loved Ones won the Midnight Madness Audience Award. Brumpton portrays Eric Stone ("Daddy") in the Australian horror film The Loved Ones.[1]

Brumpton's second film in a leading role, Dance Me to My Song (1998) was screened in competition at the 1998 Cannes Film Festival.

His third film in a leading role, Redball (1999) won the Grand Jury Prize, at the 1999 Chicago Independent Film Festival.
data.name: John Brumpton

data.biography:
Vincent Gale, 6 Mart 1968 tarihinde Glasgow, İskoçya'da dünyaya gelmiş, İskoç asıllı Kanadalı, ödüllü bir karakter oyuncusudur. Küçük yaşta ailesiyle birlikte Kanada'ya taşınan Gale, 1980'lerden bu yana profesyonel olarak sürdürdüğü oyunculuk kariyerinde sayısız film ve televizyon projesinde yer alarak sektörün en çalışkan ve saygın isimlerinden biri haline gelmiştir.

Kariyeri boyunca gösterdiği başarılı performanslar ona eleştirel övgüler de getirmiştir. 2004 yılında "Fathers & Sons" adlı filmdeki performansıyla, Kanada'nın en prestijli sinema ve televizyon ödüllerinden biri olan Leo Ödülü'nü "En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu" dalında kazanarak yeteneğini tescillemiştir.

Gale'in uluslararası alanda en çok tanındığı ve kariyerindeki en belirleyici rollerinden biri, Syfy kanalında beş sezon boyunca (2016–2021) yayınlanan "Van Helsing" dizisinde canlandırdığı "Flesh" karakteridir. Diziye Vanessa tarafından tedavi edilen ilk vampirlerden biri olarak başlayan karakteri, geçmişte işlediği suçların vicdan azabıyla yaşayan, grubun en sadık ve en insani üyelerinden birine dönüşmüştür. Gale, karakterinin bu derin ve sancılı dönüşümünü büyük bir başarıyla canlandırarak dizinin duygusal yükünü sırtlayan kilit performanslardan birini sergilemiştir.

"Van Helsing"deki bu unutulmaz rolünün yanı sıra Vincent Gale, televizyon dünyasının oldukça tanıdık bir simasıdır. "Bates Motel" dizisindeki tekrar eden rolü, "Stargate Universe", "Battlestar Galactica", "Supernatural", "Fringe" ve "The X-Files" gibi bilimkurgu ve fantezi türünün kült yapımlarındaki rolleriyle de tanınır. Vancouver'da çekilen neredeyse tüm büyük yapımlarda yer almış olması, onu Kanada televizyon endüstrisinin temel taşlarından biri yapmaktadır.

Kırk yılı aşan kariyerinde canlandırdığı her karaktere derinlik ve samimiyet katma becerisiyle tanınan Vincent Gale, hem eleştirmenler hem de meslektaşları tarafından büyük saygı gören, usta bir karakter oyuncusudur.

data.overview: Bị người cha là thanh tra trưởng ngược đãi từ nhỏ nên Joe mang trong lòng nỗi hận thù cao độ với cảnh sát. Hắn cùng một băng cướp năm người liên tục tấn công các ngân hàng. Và sau khi cướp xong, chúng cố ý nhấn chuông báo động dụ cảnh sát tới và nã súng vào họ xem như một trò vui. Trong một lần bắt tin nơi ẩn nấp của bọn cướp chúng, đội cảnh sát của thanh tra Wing gồm 9 người lọt bẫy và hi sinh, chỉ có anh thoát được. Cảm thấy có lỗi với đồng đội, Wing tìm kiếm sự an ủi trong men rượu. Phá được vô số vụ án lớn, Wing là một huyền thoại trong giới cảnh sát, được rất nhiều đàn em ngưỡng mộ, trong đó có Frank (Tạ Đình Phong). Tình cờ gặp thần tượng của mình say bí tỉ ngoài đường, Phong đưa Wing về nhà và giúp anh lấy lại sự tự tin. Hai người tạo thành một cặp ăn ý, cùng nhau họ quyết tâm tiêu diệt băng cướp vô cùng nguy hiểm của Joe.
data.title: Tân Câu Chuyện Cảnh Sát

data.biography: Edward Walter Furlong (born August 2, 1977) is an American actor whose best known film roles include John Connor in Terminator 2: Judgment Day and Daniel Vinyard in American History X. He is a two-time Saturn Award nominee, winning the 1992 Best Performance by a Younger Actor award for his performance in Terminator 2. He also won the 1992 MTV Movie Award for Best Breakthrough Performance for his work in the film.
data.name: Edward Furlong

data.biography:
Edward Walter Furlong 1977. augusztus 2-án született Glenadale-ben, Kaliforniában, az Egyesült Államokban. Édesanyja, Eleanor Torres egy ifjúsági központban dolgozott. Edwardnak van egy féltestvére, Robert Torres.

Édesanyja nővére, Nancy Tafoya és féltestvérük, Sean Furlong viselte gondját a zavaros családi körülmények között élő Edwardnak, majd később ők lettek a gyerekszínész menedzserei is. Edward 15 éves korában beleszeretetett a nála 15 évvel idősebb Jacquline Domacbe, aki tutorként került mellé, és a fiatal színész emiatt megszakította az együttműködést nagynénjével és nagybátyjával, és Domac lett a menedzsere. A pár állítólag házasságot is tervezett, ám 1998-ban viharos körülmények között szakítottak.

Edward karrierje egyik pillanatról a másikra indult, amikor megkapta John Connor szerepét a Terminátor 2. - Az ítélet napja (1991) című akciófilmben. A film hatalmas nemzetközi sikere egy csapásra ismertté tette Furlong nevét, akit ígéretes gyerekszínésznek tartottak.

A mozgalmas magánéletet élő Furlong a kilencvenes években több neves színész mellett tűnt fel a vásznon a Agyrém (1994), a Kis Odessza (1994), A gyanú árnyéka (1996) és az Amerikai história X (1998) című filmekben.

Játszott Steve Buscemi Állati kiképzés (2000) című filmjében, A holló 4. - Gonosz ima (2004) című produkcióban, a Rendezte: a Halál (2008) és a Zöld Darázs (2011) című filmekben – ám magánéleti és drogproblémái erősen rányomták bélyegüket karrierjére. Rendszeresen keveredett összetűzésbe a rendőrséggel drogbirtoklás, erőszak és rendbontás miatt, ennek ellenére rendszeresen játszik kisebb-nagyobb filmes produkciókban.

Legutóbb a Stitch (2014), az Awakened (2014) és a The Last Light (2014) című filmekben láthattuk.

Edward Walter Furlong (* 2. August 1977 in Glendale, Kalifornien) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Seine bekanntesten Rollen sind die des jungen John Connor in Terminator 2 – Tag der Abrechnung und die des Danny Vinyard in American History X. Terminator 2 war sein Filmdebüt, welches ihn schlagartig zu einem beliebten Teenager-Star machte. Er spielte während der 1990er-Jahre prägnante Haupt- und Nebenrollen in Filmen wie Little Odessa, Die Grasharfe und Davor und danach. Nach der Jahrtausendwende wirkte sich seine Drogenabhängigkeit immer mehr auf seine Karriere aus. Er musste mehrmals Rollen abgeben, so wurde er beispielsweise für Terminator 3 – Rebellion der Maschinen (2003) durch Nick Stahl ersetzt.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Edward Furlong naît à Glendale dans l'État de Californie, il est le fils d'Eleanor Tafoya Torres, issue d'une famille mexicaine. Cette dernière ne lui a jamais dit qui était son père et s'est seulement contentée de l'informer qu'il était d'origine russe. En 1990, sa mère, dépassée par les événements, le confie très vite à sa sœur Nancy Tafoya et son oncle Sean Furlong, qui deviennent ses tuteurs légaux en 1991. Il fréquente ensuite la Charles W. Eliot Middle School de Pasadena puis la South Pasadena Junior High School. Il a également un frère plus jeune nommé Bobby, né du mariage de sa mère à un autre homme.

Swoją karierę filmową rozpoczął w wieku trzynastu lat. Został odkryty na castingu do roli Johna Connora w drugiej części Terminatora. Dzięki tej roli zdobył nagrodę MTV dla najlepszego debiutu. Jego kolejne filmy to kino niezależne. Został z ich powodu wspaniale przyjęty przez krytyków, jednakże prawie wcale nie zauważony przez publiczność. Dopiero po takich filmach jak Fotokłopoty czy American History X został doceniony przez publikę.

Wychowywany przez samotna matką nigdy nie dowiedział się kto jest jego ojcem. Edward nie miał najszczęśliwszego dzieciństwa co sprawiło, że wydaje się starszy niż jest naprawdę.

Jako trzynastolatek został odkryty przez agenta castingu, który zaproponował mu rolę Johna Connora w drugiej części "Terminatora" (1991), u boku Arnolda Schwarzeneggera. Rola ta przyniosła mu rozgłos i nagrodę MTV dla najlepszego debiutu. Mimo sukcesu odniesionego w filmie komercyjnym, Edward Furlong wybrał pracę w kinie niezależnym. Jego kolejne role w filmach "American Heart" (1993) Martina Bella , "Mała Odessa" (1994) Jamesa Graya i "Harfa traw" (1995) Charlesa Matthau były wysoko oceniane przez krytyków, lecz prawie niezauważane przez publiczność. W filmie Barbeta Schroedera "Wczoraj i dziś" (1996) zagrał główną rolę - Jacoba Ryana, młodego człowieka oskarżonego o zamordowanie swojej dziewczyny. Do łask publiczności Furlong powrócił w roku 1998 filmami "Fotokłopoty" i "Więzień nienawiści". Rolą Peckera w filmie Johna Watersa Edward udowodnił swoje zdolności jako aktor-satyryk. Talentem dramatycznym zabłysnął grając młodocianego neonazistę u boku Edwarda Nortona w kontrowersyjnym "Więźniu nienawiści" w reżyserii Tony'ego Kaye.

W filmie "Gniazdo os" w reżyserii Steve'a Buscemi gra studenta prawa niesłusznie skazanego za handel narkotykami i osadzonego w więzieniu o zaostrzonym rygorze.

Oprócz grania w filmach Edward Furlong nagrał również płytę. Jego debiutancki album "Hold on Tight" odniósł wielki sukces w Japonii, gdzie aktor zyskał status gwiazdy muzyki pop.
爱德华·沃尔特·弗隆（Edward Walter Furlong，1977 年 8 月 2 日出生）是一位美国演员，他最著名的电影角色包括《终结者 2：审判日》中的约翰·康纳和《美国历史 X》中的丹尼尔·温亚德。他曾两次获得土星奖提名，并因在《终结者2》中的表演而获得1992年最佳年轻演员奖。他还凭借在电影中的工作获得了 1992 年 MTV 电影奖最佳突破表演奖。
data.name: 爱德华·弗朗

data.biography: 愛德華·沃爾特·弗隆（Edward Walter Furlong，1977 年 8 月 2 日出生）是一位美國演員，他最著名的電影角色包括《未來戰士 2：審判日》中的約翰·康納和《美國歷史 X》中的丹尼爾·温亞德。他曾兩次獲得土星獎提名，並因在《未來戰士 2》中的表演而獲得 1992 年最佳年輕演員獎。他還憑藉在電影中的工作獲得了 1992 年 MTV 電影獎最佳突破錶演獎。
data.name: 愛德華·費朗

data.biography:
Meghan, Duchess of Sussex (born Rachel Meghan Markle; August 4, 1981), is an American member of the British royal family and a former actress.

Markle was born and raised in Los Angeles, California. Her acting career began while at Northwestern University. She attributed early career difficulties to her biracial heredity. Her last and most significant on-screen role was that of Rachel Zane for seven seasons (2011–2018) in the American TV legal drama Suits. She also developed a social media presence. This included The Tig (2014–2017) lifestyle blog which garnered recognition for her fashion sense and led to the creation and release of two clothing lines in 2015–2016. During The Tig period, Markle became involved in charity work focused primarily on women's issues and social justice.

Markle was married to American film producer Trevor Engelson from 2011 until their divorce in 2013. She retired from acting upon her marriage to Prince Harry in 2018 and became known as the Duchess of Sussex. The marriage prompted favorable comments about having a mixed-race person in the royal family. Nevertheless, the couple stepped down as senior members in 2020 due to personal privacy issues and perceived hostile media treatment, particularly by the British tabloids. They subsequently settled in her native California to pursue business ventures and charity work. They have two children, Archie and Lilibet Mountbatten-Windsor.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex

data.biography:
Rachel Meghan Markle ist ein US-amerikanisches Model und eine Schauspielerin.

Einem größeren Publikum wurde sie durch die Rolle als Rechtsanwaltsfachangestellte Rachel Zane in der Fernsehserie Suits bekannt. Ende November 2017 verkündete sie den Ausstieg aus der Serie und ihre Verlobung mit Prinz Harry von Wales.
data.name: Meghan, Herzogin von Sussex

data.biography: 梅根·马克尔（Meghan Markle），常被称为“梅根王妃” ，1981年8月4日出生于美国加利福尼亚州洛杉矶，英国国王查尔斯三世次子哈里王子的妻子。梅根的父亲是荷兰裔爱尔兰人，母亲是非裔美国人。幼年时，父母离异，她更多时间跟着身为灯光师的父亲生活。私立中学毕业后，前往伊利诺伊州西北大学攻读戏剧与国际关系双学位。大学毕业后先在美国驻布宜诺斯艾利斯使馆工作，因未通过外交官考试，后转行成为演员。2002年，参演《综合医院》，首次在荧幕亮相，随后陆续参演《相见恨早》、《家庭战争》、《前往希腊剧院》、《恶老板》等影视作品。2011年，凭借电视剧《金装律师》获得人气，步入演艺上升期；同年与美国电影制作人特里沃·恩格尔森结婚，婚后育有一女。2013年，与特里沃离婚。2014年至2016年，陆续主演《When Sparks Fly》、《约会指南》等作品。2016年6月，在英国参加活动时，与哈里王子结识，随后开始交往。2018年5月19日，与哈里在温莎城堡圣乔治教堂举行婚礼，被授予萨塞克斯公爵夫人封号。婚后，淡出演艺界，专注从事王室活动。2019年，生下儿子阿尔奇。2020年，梅根和哈里定居美国，宣布退出英国王室公职，投身慈善事业，不再使用王妃称号，但保留使用萨塞克斯公爵夫人封号。2021年，和哈里的女儿莉莉贝特出生。梅根曾先后于2018年、2021年被《时代》杂志评为年度全球百大最具影响力人物。
data.name: 梅根·马克尔
サセックス公爵夫人メーガン
เมแกน ดัชเชสแห่งซัสเซกซ์
薩塞克斯公爵夫人梅根

data.biography: 梅根·馬克爾（Meghan Markle），常被稱為“梅根王妃” ，1981 年 8 月 4 日出生於美國加利福尼亞州洛杉磯，英國國王查爾斯三世次子哈里王子的妻子。梅根的父親是荷蘭裔愛爾蘭人，母親是非裔美國人。幼年時，父母離異，她更多時間跟著身為燈光師的父親生活。私立中學畢業後，前往伊利諾伊州西北大學攻讀戲劇與國際關係雙學位。大學畢業後先在美國駐布宜諾斯艾利斯使館工作，因未通過外交官考試，後轉行成為演員。2002 年，參演《綜合醫院》，首次在熒幕亮相，隨後陸續參演《相見恨早》、《家庭戰爭》、《前往希臘劇院》、《邊個波士唔抵死？》等影視作品。2011 年，憑藉電視劇《金裝律師》獲得人氣，步入演藝上升期；同年與美國電影製作人特里沃·恩格爾森結婚，婚後育有一女。2013 年，與特里沃離婚。2014 年至 2016 年，陸續主演《When Sparks Fly》、《約會指南》等作品。2016 年 6 月，在英國參加活動時，與哈里王子結識，隨後開始交往。2018 年 5 月 19 日，與哈里在温莎城堡聖喬治教堂舉行婚禮，被授豫薩塞克斯公爵夫人封號。婚後，淡出演藝界，專注從事王室活動。2019 年，生下兒子阿爾奇。2020 年，梅根和哈里定居美國，宣佈退出英國王室公職，投身慈善事業，不再使用王妃稱號，但保留使用薩塞克斯公爵夫人封號。2021 年，和哈里的女兒莉莉貝特出生。梅根曾先後於 2018 年、2021 年被《時代》雜誌評為年度全球百大最具影響力人物。
data.name: 薩塞克斯公爵夫人梅根

data.biography:
Friederike Kempter ist eine deutsche Schauspielerin.  In Zwei vom Blitz getroffen spielte sie 2000 neben Mariele Millowitsch eine Hauptrolle, ebenso in dem Kurzfilm Moianacht. Dem Fernsehpublikum bekannt ist Friederike Kempter vor allem als Kommissarin  Nadeshda Krusenstern an der Seite von Axel Prahl und Jan Josef Liefers im Tatort aus Münster sowie durch ihr Mitwirken im Ensemble von Ladykracher (2008–2012). 2011 war Kempter in der Comedysendung Die Wochenshow bei Sat.1 zu sehen. Seit 2012 spielt sie in der ARD-Vorabendserie Heiter bis tödlich: Hauptstadtrevier eine Hauptrolle als „Elitepolizistin“.

Für ihre Nebenrolle der neurotischen Ausdruckstänzerin Julika in Jan-Ole Gersters Berliner Tragikomödie Oh Boy (2012) war sie für den Deutschen Filmpreis nominiert.

2015 stand sie in Berlin im Theater am Kurfürstendamm neben u. a. Annette Frier, Ursula Karusseit und Felix von Manteuffel für Eine Familie - August: Osage County, dem im Original gleichnamigen Bühnenwerk von Tracy Letts, auf der Bühne.

Friederike Kempter (born 23 August 1979) is a German actress. Her acting credits include films like Pandorum and A Coffee in Berlin as well as television shows like Ladykracher and Hauptstadtrevier. She has played Police Kommissar Nadeshda Krusenstern in the Thiel and Boerne Tatort episodes since 2002.
data.name: Friederike Kempter

data.biography: Friederike Kempter（1979年8月23日-），德国女演员。她的演艺作品包括《Pandorum》和《A Coffee in Berlin》等电影，以及《Ladykracher》和《Hauptstadtrevier》等电视节目。自 2002 年以来，她一直在 Thiel 和 Boerne Tatort 剧集中扮演警察 Nadeshda Krusenstern。
data.name: 弗雷德里克·坎普特

data.biography: 弗雷德里克·坎普特（1979 年 8 月 23 日-），德國女演員。她的演藝作品包括《Pandorum》和《A Coffee in Berlin》等電影，以及《Ladykracher》和《Hauptstadtrevier》等電視節目。自 2002 年以來，她一直在 Thiel 和 Boerne Tatort 劇集中扮演警察 Nadeshda Krusenstern。
data.name: 弗雷德里克·坎普特

data.biography:
Jenna Lee Dewan (born December 3, 1980) is an American actress and dancer. She started her career as a backup dancer for Janet Jackson, and later worked with artists including Christina Aguilera, Pink, and Missy Elliott. She is known for her role as Nora Clark in the 2006 film Step Up. She has also starred on the short-lived NBC series The Playboy Club and had a recurring role on the FX series American Horror Story: Asylum. She portrayed Freya Beauchamp on the Lifetime series Witches of East End, Lucy Lane in The CW series Supergirl and its spin-off, Superman & Lois and Joanna in Soundtrack on Netflix. Dewan has hosted the reality television shows World of Dance and Flirty Dancing and served as a judge on Come Dance with Me. She currently stars as Bailey on ABC's The Rookie. She also had a recurring role on the FOX medical drama The Resident.

Dewan was born in Hartford, Connecticut, the daughter of Nancy Bursch Smith (née Bursch) and Darryll Dewan, who was a running back on the 1972 Notre Dame football team. Her father is of Lebanese and Polish descent and her mother is of German and English ancestry. Her parents divorced when she was young and her mother remarried Claude Brooks Smith. During high school at Grapevine High School in Grapevine, Texas, Dewan was a varsity cheerleader. She graduated in 1999 and was voted prom queen her senior year. She went to University of Southern California and was a member of the California Gamma Chapter of Pi Beta Phi.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jenna Dewan, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jenna Dewan

data.biography:
Jenna Dewan é uma atriz e dançarina norte-americana. Ela é mais conhecida por seus papéis em Tamara, Ela Dança, Eu Danço, Witches of East End e Supergirl.

Jenna teve um relacionamento amoroso com Justin Timberlake em 2002 e com Shane West de 2003 a 2005.

Em 2005, conheceu o ator Channing Tatum no set de Step Up. Eles começaram a namorar logo após o término das filmagens. O casal ficou noivo em setembro de 2008 em Maui, Havaí. No dia 11 de julho de 2009, eles se casaram em Malibu, Califórnia.

Em dezembro de 2012, Jenna e Channing anunciaram a gravidez do primeiro filho do casal. Everly Elizabeth Maiselle Tatum nasceu no dia 31 de maio de 2013, em Londres.

Em 3 de abril de 2018 anunciaram a separação.

珍娜·迪万1980年出生在美国康涅狄格州首府哈特佛德市，后在德克萨斯州的葡萄藤市长大，曾就读于南加州大学。她的身上有一半的黎巴嫩血统，五岁时便迷上了舞蹈，后被一位舞蹈经纪人发掘，跟随珍妮·杰克逊、瑞奇·马丁、超级男孩等著名音乐人等上过世界各地的巡演舞台，此外还出演过贾斯丁·汀波莱克、曼迪·摩尔以及Missy Elliot等人的音乐录影带。表演方面，珍娜·迪万先是在肥皂喜剧《Quintuplets》、《The Young and The Restless》以及《Joey》中亮相，05年担任恐怖片《塔玛拉》的主角而登上银幕，06年又被好莱坞著名舞指安妮·弗莱彻相中在其第一部执导影片《舞出我人生》中出演了一位艺术学校舞蹈专业的高材生，剧情的羸弱以及她同男主角查宁·塔图姆之间缺乏火花的对手戏为本片带来的批评之声却不能阻挡它在北美尽收6532万美金的票房，表现着实亮眼，可惜的是迪万却没能获得男主角查宁·塔图姆那般的关注度。此外她还在06年上映的另外三部影片《Waterborne》、《Take the Lead》以及《咒怨2》中有过角色，最新作品则是和克里斯汀·史莱特共同主演的动作惊悚片《Love Lies Bleeding》。
data.name: 珍娜·迪万

data.biography:
Jenna Lee Dewan (Hartford, Connecticut, 1980. december 3. –) amerikai színésznő, táncosnő.

Legismertebb szerepe Nora Clark a Step Up (2006) című zenés-táncos romantikus filmben. Visszatérő szereplő a CBS csatorna Supergirl című sorozatában, melyben Lucy Lane-t alakítja.

1980. december 3-án született Hartfordban, Nancy Bursch és Darryll Dewan lányaként. Apja fél szíriai-libanoni és fél lengyel, anyja pedig német és angol származású. Jenna Grapevine-ben, Texas-ban nőtt fel, és 5 éves korában fedezte fel szeretetét a tánc iránt. A Grapevine High School-ban diplomázott, valamint a University of Southern California-ba is járt.

Több videóklipben is szerepelt, olyan előadókéban, mint Justin Timberlake, Mandy Moore és Missy Elliott. Olyan televíziós szitkomban tűnt fel, mint a Quintuplets, a Nyughatatlan fiatalok és a Joey. Leginkább mint Nora Clark ismert a Step Up című filmből, amelyben Channing Tatum volt a partnere. 2015-ben megkapta Lucy Lane, Lois Lane húgának és James Olsen barátnőjének szerepét.

珍娜·迪萬 1980 年出生在美國康涅狄格州首府哈特佛德市，後在德克薩斯州的葡萄藤市長大，曾就讀於南加州大學。她的身上有一半的黎巴嫩血統，五歲時便迷上了舞蹈，後被一位舞蹈經紀人發掘，跟隨珍妮·傑克遜、瑞奇·馬丁、超級男孩等著名音樂人等上過世界各地的巡演舞台，此外還出演過賈斯丁·汀波萊克、曼迪·摩爾以及 Missy Elliot 等人的音樂錄影帶。表演方面，珍娜·迪萬先是在肥皂喜劇《Quintuplets》、《The Young and The Restless》以及《Joey》中亮相，05 年擔任恐怖片《塔瑪拉》的主角而登上銀幕，06 年又被好萊塢著名舞指安妮·弗萊徹相中在其第一部執導影片《舞出我人生》中出演了一位藝術學校舞蹈專業的高材生，劇情的羸弱以及她同男主角查寧·塔圖姆之間缺乏火花的對手戲為本片帶來的批評之聲卻不能阻擋它在北美盡收 6532 萬美金的票房，表現著實亮眼，可惜的是迪萬卻沒能獲得男主角查寧·塔圖姆那般的關注度。此外她還在 06 年上映的另外三部影片《Waterborne》、《Take the Lead》以及《咒怨 2》中有過角色，最新作品則是和克里斯汀·史萊特共同主演的動作驚悚片《Love Lies Bleeding》。
data.name: 珍娜·迪萬

data.biography: Jenna Lee Dewan (Hartford, Connecticut; 3 de diciembre de 1980) es una actriz, bailarina y modelo estadounidense, conocida por haber interpretado a Nora Clark en la película Step Up.

Amrita Acharia (also spelled Acharya) is a Norwegian actress of Ukrainian and Nepalese background. Acharia was born in Nepal to a Nepalese father and Ukrainian mother. She grew up in Kathmandu, Ukraine, England and Tromsø. She speaks Ukrainian, Russian and English, in addition to learning Norwegian when she moved to Norway at age thirteen. After finishing high school in Norway, she moved to England at age nineteen to pursue her acting career. Acharia played the role of the Dothraki handmaiden Irri in the first two seasons of Game of Thrones. Her character was written out of the series during the second season, despite surviving far longer in the books upon which the series is based. In 2011, Acharia starred in the one off BBC Christmas show, Lapland.
data.name: Amrita Acharia
アムリタ・アチャリア

data.biography: Edward Francis Jemison, Jr. (born November 25, 1963) is an American film and television actor. He is known for his roles as Livingston Dell in the Ocean's film trilogy and Mickey Duka in The Punisher, as well as the television series Hung, iZombie and Chicago Med.

data.biography: 爱德华·弗朗西斯·杰米森（Edward Francis Jemison， Jr.，1963年11月25日-），美国影视演员。他因在《海洋》电影三部曲中饰演利文斯顿·戴尔和在《惩罚者》中饰演米奇·杜卡以及电视连续剧《洪》、《iZombie》和《芝加哥地中海》而闻名。

data.biography:
Rolf Saxon is an American actor. He is well known for his voice-over work in video games, movies and TV shows.

Saxon was born at Fort Belvoir in Alexandria, Virginia. He has worked with the American Conservatory Theater, Cal Shakes, the Berkeley Mime Troupe, and Omphalos Street Theatre Company. He will also be starring in Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning, set for debut in 2025, alongside Tom Cruise.

Upon graduating from the Guildhall School of Music and Drama, Saxon was awarded the Gold Medal. While performing with the Omphalos Street Theatre Company at the Edinburgh Festival, he was nominated for the Fringe First Award. Critics praised Saxon's performance as Victor Franz in The Price play, earning him the Best Actor in A Leading Role Award at the Manchester Evening News Theatre Awards. Films such as Saving Private Ryan and Tomorrow Never Dies, the TV series Agatha Christie's Poirot, and video games such as the Broken Sword series and The Witcher have received several awards and nominations.

Description above from the Wikipedia article about Rolf Saxon, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Rolf Saxon

data.biography:
Født: 7-7-1955 i Alexandria, Virginia, USA

Rolf Saxon, amerikanske skuespiller, er uddannet på The American Conservatory Theatre i San Francisco og på den meget anerkendte Guildhall School of Music and Drama i London. Siden 1980 har Rolf Saxon boet og arbejdet i London. Han castes meget ofte - ligesom i TV-serien Ørnen - til at spille amerikaner i udlandet. Rolf Saxons karriere deler sig mellem teaterscenen, hvor han blandt meget andet har spillet overfor Hollywod-stjernen Darryl Hannah i hendes West End-debut i "The Seven Year Itch". Derudover har han medvirket i flere tv-serier og i en del engelske og amerikanske spillefilm. Blandt de mest kendte er "Mission Impossible", James Bond-filmen "Tomorrow never dies", Steven Spielbergs "Saving Private Ryan" og "Lokkeduen" med Sean Connery og Cathrine Zeta-Jones.

Bryce Dallas Howard (born March 2, 1981) is an American actress and director. The eldest child of filmmaker Ron Howard, she studied acting at the New York University Tisch School of the Arts. While portraying Rosalind in a 2003 production of As You Like It, Howard caught the attention of director M. Night Shyamalan, who cast her as a blind girl in the thriller film The Village (2004) and a naiad in the fantasy film Lady in the Water (2006).

Howard's performance in Kenneth Branagh's romance film As You Like It (2006) earned her a Golden Globe Award nomination. She subsequently appeared as Gwen Stacy in Sam Raimi's superhero film Spider-Man 3 (2007). She went on to appear as Kate Connor in the action film Terminator Salvation (2009) and as Victoria in the fantasy film The Twilight Saga: Eclipse (2010). She also appeared in the drama film The Help (2011), the comedy-drama film 50/50 (2011), the fantasy film Pete's Dragon (2016), and the musical film Rocketman (2019). Howard gained further recognition with her role as Claire Dearing in the top-grossing Jurassic World trilogy (2015–2022).

Additionally, Howard directed the documentary film Dads (2019) and episodes of the Disney+ space western series The Mandalorian (2019–present) and The Book of Boba Fett (2022).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Bryce Dallas Howard, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Bryce Dallas Howard

data.biography:
Bryce Dallas Howard (* 2. März 1981 in Los Angeles) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Filmregisseurin.

Bekannt wurde sie vorwiegend durch M. Night Shyamalans Filme The Village – Das Dorf (2004) und Das Mädchen aus dem Wasser (2006). 2007 spielte sie die Rolle der Gwen Stacy in Spider-Man 3. 2009 war sie im vierten Teil der Terminator-Filmreihe, Terminator: Die Erlösung, in der Rolle der Kate Connor zu sehen.

Howard übernahm 2009 die Rolle der Victoria im dritten Teil der Twilight Saga Eclipse – Biss zum Abendrot (2010). In dem Drama The Help spielte sie 2011 die Rolle der Hilly Holbrook.  Für Jurassic World, die dritte Fortsetzung von Jurassic Park, stand sie ab April 2014 in der Hauptrolle der Claire Dearing vor der Kamera, die sie auch 2018 in der Fortsetzung Jurassic World: Das gefallene Königreich verkörperte. Im Herbst 2015 drehte sie mit Matthew McConaughey das Filmdrama Gold – Gier hat eine neue Farbe.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Bryce Dallas Howard (2 de marzo de 1981) es una actriz, guionista y directora estadounidense, hija del director Ron Howard. Hizo su debut como actriz bajo la dirección de su padre en la película Parenthood en 1989 y pasó a tener pequeños papeles en películas y hacer apariciones en el escenario en los años siguientes. Durante este tiempo ella también asistió a la New York University (NYU), Tisch School of the Arts, luego de conseguir la Licenciatura en Bellas Artes, y se inscribió en escuelas de arte dramático. Después de ganar la atención de M. Night Shyamalan, este le dio un papel en lo que sería su primera película como protagonista, The Village (2004) y La joven del agua (2006). Su actuación en Como gustéis (2006) le valió una nominación al Globo de Oro en 2008.

Howard logró más reconocimiento por parte del público con sus papeles en Spider-Man 3 (2007), Terminator Salvation (2009), The Twilight Saga: Eclipse (2010), The Help (2011), Jurassic World (2015) y en Jurassic World: El reino caído (2018).

💥Брайс Даллас Ховард. Родилась в 1981-ом году в Лос-Анджелесе, Калифорния, США. Росла в семье с 2-мя младшими сёстрами и младшим братом. Отец работал актёром, а мать была писательницей. Училась в Школе искусств Тиш при Нью-Йоркском университете. Работает актрисой и режиссёром. С 2006-го замужем за актёром Сетом Гейблом, у пары 2-ое детей: сын Теодор и дочь Беатрис

🏆Главные награды🏆: Номинация на Золотой глобус (2008) [Как вам это понравится]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Аргайл» (2024), «Человек-паук 3: Враг в отражении» (2007), «Прислуга» (2011), «Мир Юрского периода» (2015), «Как вам это понравится» (2006)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: В детстве Брайс не разрешали смотреть телевизор, поэтому она много читала и занималась творчеством
data.name: Брайс Даллас Ховард

data.biography: Actrice et fille de Ron Howard qui a décroché son premier grand rôle dans le film M. Night Shyamalan en 2004, The Village. Elle a reçu une nomination aux Golden Globe Awards pour sa performance dans le téléfilm As You Like It. Elle joue également le rôle de Claire Dearing dans la superproduction Jurassic World de 2015.

Színészcsaládból származik. Első szerepére 1989-ben került sor, a Vásott szülők című filmben statisztált, majd később az Apollo 13-ban kapott kisebb szerepet, 2000-ben pedig a Grincsben láthattuk. Elvégezte a Stagedoor Manort, és 2003-ban diplomát szerezett New York University Tisch School of the Arts dráma szakán. Közben több Broadway darabban szerepelt. Áttörő szerepére a 2004-es A faluban került sor. 2006-ban ismét együtt dolgozott Shyamalannel, ezúttal a Lány a vízben című fantasy filmen. 2006-ban az Ahogy tetszik című Shakespeare darab Kenneth Branagh által készített filmes feldolgozásában is eljátszhatta Rosalindát. Alakításáért 2008-ban Golden Globe-díjra jelölték. 2015-ben a Jurassic World női főszerepében láthatjuk Chris Pratt oldalán.

2006. június 17-én ment hozzá barátjához, Seth Gabelhez, két gyermekük született, Theodore Norman Howard-Gabel és Beatrice Jean Howard-Gabel.

Urodziła się 2 marca 1981 roku w Dallas, w stanie Teksas. Jest córką znanego aktora i reżysera amerykańskiego Rona Howarda i aktorki Cheryl Alley. Jako 14-latka zadebiutowała niewielką rolą u ojca w filmie "Apollo 13". Szybko zrozumiała, że zanim zacznie robić karierę, musi zdobyć dobre wykształcenie. Skończyła prestiżową nowojorską Tisch School of the Arts i studiowała aktorstwo w Konserwatorium Stelli Adler. Brała lekcje śpiewu, tańca, gry aktorskiej i historii teatru. Tam wypatrzył ją indyjski reżyser Manoj Night Shyamalan, który z pominięciem castingu, obsadził ją w roli Ivy Walker w thrillerze "Osada". Niedługo potem otrzymała rolę Grace w dramacie Larsa von Triera "Manderlay".

Attrice e regista statunitense. Figlia del regista Ron Howard, ha avuto il primo ruolo di spessore grazie al regista M. Night Shyamalan, che l'ha scelta per il thriller psicologico The Village e per il ruolo da protagonista del film thriller-fantasy Lady in the Water

Bryce Dallas Howard (nascido em 2 de março de 1981) é uma atriz e diretora americana. Ela é a filha mais velha do ator e cineasta Ron Howard e conseguiu seu primeiro papel importante no cinema no longa de M. Night Shyamalan de 2004, The Village (2004). Ela recebeu uma indicação ao Globo de Ouro por sua atuação no filme para TV As You Like It. Ela também estrela como Claire Dearing no blockbuster Jurassic World de 2015.

布莱斯来自大名鼎鼎的霍华德家族，其父是美国著名导演罗恩·霍华德，其母是女演员谢莉尔·霍华德，此外，布莱斯的祖父母和叔叔克林特·霍华德同样是电影工作者。 早在童年时代，布莱斯就曾在父亲罗恩的电影中露脸，其中就包括著名的《阿波罗13号》，然而真正让世人记住这个名字的电影是印度导演奈特·沙马兰的作品《灵异村》。2006年，两人再度合作的作品《水中女妖》无疑因《灵异村》的盛名而倍受关注。

data.biography: ولدت بريس دالاس هوارد في لوس انجلوس عام 1981 وهي نجلة "رون خوارد" الممثل السابق الذي احترف لاحقا الإخراج وحصد جائزة الأوسكار ووالدتها هي الفنانة والكاتبة "شيريل هوارد" كما أن عمها هو الممثل "كلينت هوارد" وجديها أيضا شاركا بالعديد من الأعمال الفنية وقد درست بمدرسة "جرينتش" و"بيرام هيلز" الثانوية في أرمونك بنيويورك ثم التحقت بمدرسة مانور ودرست الفنون المسرحية كما درست في معهد الموسيقي "ستيلا أدلر" في نيويورك وأخيرا تخرجت من كلية تيش جامعة نيويورك للفنون والدراما (2003) ثم اعتلت خشبة مسارح "برودواي" لتلعب بعض الأدوار في المسرحيات الكلاسيكية لوليم شكسبير وقد بدأت التألق بالأفلام وهي مازالت بسن صغير وكان ذلك في فيلم "Apollo 13" عام 1995 ومن أبرز أعمالها "Spider-Man 3" عام 2007. وسلسلة (Jurassic World).

Bryce Dallas Howard (* 2. März 1981 in Los Angeles) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und Filmregisseurin.

Bryce Dallas Howard ist die Tochter des Regisseurs Ron Howard. Ihr erster Vorname leitet sich vom Bryce Canyon ab, der für sein rotes Gestein bekannt ist; ihr zweiter Vorname leitet sich von der texanischen Stadt Dallas ab, in der sie gezeugt wurde. Sie studierte an der Tisch School of the Arts der New York University sowie am Stella Adler Conservatory und sammelte erste Erfahrungen als Theaterschauspielerin am Broadway.

Bekannt wurde sie vorwiegend mit M. Night Shyamalans The Village – Das Dorf (2004) und Das Mädchen aus dem Wasser (2006). 2007 spielte sie die Rolle der Gwen Stacy in Spider-Man 3. 2009 war sie im vierten Teil der Terminator-Filmreihe, Terminator: Die Erlösung, in der Rolle der Kate Connor zu sehen. 2009 übernahm Howard die Rolle der Victoria im dritten Teil der Twilight-Saga Eclipse – Biss zum Abendrot (2010). Damit ersetzte sie Rachelle Lefèvre, die vorher die Victoria in Twilight – Bis(s) zum Morgengrauen und New Moon – Bis(s) zur Mittagsstunde gespielt hatte.

Unter der Regie von Clint Eastwood war sie 2010 in Hereafter – Das Leben danach neben Matt Damon zu sehen. In dem Drama The Help spielte sie 2011 die Rolle der Hilly Holbrook. Dabei kam sie an der Seite von Emma Stone und Viola Davis zum Einsatz. Der Film beruht auf dem gleichnamigen Buch von Kathryn Stockett, das die Arbeit von afroamerikanischen Hausangestellten in den Haushalten weißer Familien zu Beginn der 1960er Jahre in den US-Südstaaten thematisiert.

Für Jurassic World, die dritte Fortsetzung von Jurassic Park, stand sie ab April 2014 in der Hauptrolle der Claire Dearing vor der Kamera, die sie auch 2018 in der Fortsetzung Jurassic World: Das gefallene Königreich verkörperte. Im Herbst 2015 drehte sie mit Matthew McConaughey das Filmdrama Gold – Gier hat eine neue Farbe.

Howard ist auch als Regisseurin aktiv. Nach den Kurzfilmen Orchids (2006) und When You Find Me (2011) war sie an dem Film Nennt mich verrückt! (2013) beteiligt. Mit Dads (2019) inszenierte sie einen Dokumentarfilm. Außerdem ist sie an der Serie The Mandalorian als Regisseurin beteiligt.

Im Jahr 2017 wurde sie in die Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) aufgenommen, die jährlich die Oscars vergibt.

Nach fünfjähriger Beziehung ist Howard seit dem 17. Juni 2006 mit dem Schauspieler Seth Gabel verheiratet. Ein gemeinsamer Sohn wurde im Februar 2007 geboren. Im Januar 2012 gebar Howard eine Tochter.

Bryce Dallas Howard (Los Angeles, Califòrnia, 2 de març de 1981) és una actriu, guionista i directora estatunidenca, filla del director Ron Howard. Va fer el seu debut com a actriu sota la direcció del seu pare en la pel·lícula Parenthood el 1989 i va passar a tindre alguns papers menors en pel·lícules i a fer aparicions en l'escenari els següents anys. Després de captar l'atenció de M. Night Shyamalan, este li va donar un paper en el que seria la seua primera pel·lícula com a protagonista, The Village (2004); i després a Lady in the Water (2006). La seua actuació en As You Like It (2006) li va valdre una nominació al Globus d'Or el 2008.

Η Μπράις Ντάλας Χάουαρντ (Bryce Dallas Howard) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός και κόρη του σκηνοθέτη Ρον Χάουαρντ. Έκανε το υποκριτικό της ντεμπούτο στην ταινία του πάτερα της Δεσμοί Στοργής (Parenthood) το 1989 και συνέχισε με μικρούς ρόλους σε ταινίες και θέατρο για τα επόμενα χρόνια. Κατά τη διάρκεια αυτής της περιόδου φοίτησε στο New York University. Αφού κέρδισε την προσοχή του Μ. Νάιτ Σιάμαλαν, ο σκηνοθέτης της έδωσε τον πρωταγωνιστικό ρόλο στις ταινίες Σκοτεινό Χωριό (The Village, 2004) και Lady in the Water (2006), η οποία ήταν εμπορική και καλλιτεχνική αποτυχία. Η ερμηνεία της στην ταινία Όπως Σας Αρέσει (As You Like It, 2006) της χάρισε μια υποψηφιότητα για Χρυσή Σφαίρα το 2008.

Η Χάουαρντ έγινε γνωστή στο κοινό ως Γκουέν Στέισι το 2007 με το Spider-Man 3 και ως Βικτόρια στην ταινία Έκλειψη (Eclipse, 2010) της σειράς ταινιών Twilight. Αυτές οι ταινίες μαζί με την ταινία Εξολοθρευτής: Η σωτηρία (Terminator Salvation, 2009) είναι οι μεγαλύτερες σε εισπράξεις ταινίες της αλλά και οι τρεις πήραν μικτές κριτικές από τον τύπο. Επίσης πρωταγωνίστησε στην ταινία Υπηρέτριες (The Help, 2011) μαζί με την Έμμα Στόουν και τη Βαϊόλα Ντέιβις. Η ταινία έγινε κριτική και εισπρακτική επιτυχία.

Η Χάουαρντ αναδείχθηκε σταρ με τον ρόλο της ως Κλερ Ντίρινγκ στην κορυφαία τριλογία του Jurassic World (2015–2022). Υποδύθηκε επίσης μία δασοφύλακα στην ταινία περιπέτειας Pete's Dragon (2016), την Sheila Dwight, η μητέρα του Elton John, στη βιογραφική ταινία Rocketman (2019) και εξέφρασε τη φωνή του Yaddle σε ένα επεισόδιο του Tales of the Jedi (2022).

Η Χάουαρντ σκηνοθέτησε το ντοκιμαντέρ Dads (2019) και τα επεισόδια της διαστημικής σειράς γουέστερν της Disney+ The Mandalorian (2019–σήμερα) και The Book of Boba Fett (2022). Η αγάπη της για την αφήγηση την οδήγησε να δημιουργήσει το Nine Muses Entertainment και το Nine Muses Lab ως μέρος της σχολής στο Tisch School of the Arts του Πανεπιστημίου της Νέας Υόρκης. Είναι παντρεμένη με τον ηθοποιό Seth Gabel, με τον οποίο έχει δύο παιδιά.
data.name: Μπράις Ντάλας Χάουαρντ

data.biography:
拜絲來自大名鼎鼎的侯活家族，其父是美國著名導演朗·侯活，其母是女演員雪兒·侯活，此外，拜絲的祖父母和叔叔奇聯·侯活同樣是電影工作者。

早在童年時代，拜絲就曾在父親朗的電影中露臉，其中就包括著名的《太陽神 13 號》，然而真正讓世人記住這個名字的電影是印度導演奈特·沙馬蘭的作品《森魔》。2006 年，兩人再度合作的作品《禍水》無疑因《森魔》的盛名而倍受關注。
data.name: 拜絲·黛麗·侯活

data.biography:
Bryce Dallas Howard (d. 2 Mart 1981) Amerikalı oyuncu ve yönetmendir. Los Angeles'ta doğan Howard, New York Üniversitesi Tisch School of the Arts'a katıldı ve 2002'de Broadway'de rol almak için ayrıldı ancak 2020'de mezun oldu. Howard, 2003 yapımı As You Like It'te Rosalind'i canlandırırken, yönetmen M. Night Shyamalan'ın dikkatini çekti ve onu psikolojik gerilim filmi The Village'da (2004) yerel bir şefin kör kızı olarak oynattı. Daha sonra Shyamalan'ın fantastik gerilim filmi Lady in the Water'da (2006) fantastik bir dünyadan kaçan bir naiad rolünde başrol oynadı.

Howard, Kenneth Branagh'ın As You Like It (2006) filmindeki performansıyla Altın Küre Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi ve ardından Sam Raimi'nin süper kahraman filmi Spider-Man 3'te (2007) Gwen Stacy rolüyle karşımıza çıktı. Daha sonra aksiyon filmi Terminator Salvation'da (2009) Kate Connor ve fantastik film The Twilight Saga: Eclipse'de (2010) Victoria rollerini üstlendi; her iki film de başarılı oldu ancak eleştirmenlerden karışık yorumlar aldı. Howard'ın komedi-drama 50/50'deki (2011) “adil hava” kız arkadaşı ve dönem-drama The Help'teki (2011) ırkçı bir sosyete rolleri övgü topladı.

Howard'ın tanınırlığı, macera filmi Jurassic World (2015) ve devam filmleri Jurassic World'de Claire Dearing rolünü üstlenmesiyle arttı: Fallen Kingdom (2018) ve Jurassic World Dominion (2022), ilk ikisi en başarılı filmleri olarak sıralanıyor. Ayrıca macera filminde bir orman bekçisini canlandırdı

Howard'ın tanınırlığı, macera filmi Jurassic World (2015) ve devam filmleri Jurassic World'de Claire Dearing rolünü üstlenmesiyle arttı: Fallen Kingdom (2018) ve Jurassic World Dominion (2022) adlı devam filmlerinde Claire Dearing rolüyle tanındı. Ayrıca macera filmi Pete's Dragon'da (2016) bir orman bekçisini ve biyografik film Rocketman'de (2019) Elton John'un annesi Sheila Dwight'ı canlandırdı, Tales of the Jedi'da (2022) Yaddle'ı seslendirdi.

Howard, Dads (2019) belgeselini ve Disney+ uzay western dizisi The Mandalorian (2019-) ve The Book of Boba Fett (2022) bölümlerini yönetti. Babası aktör ve film yapımcısı Ron Howard olan Howard, iki çocuk sahibi olduğu aktör Seth Gabel ile evlidir.

Angela McEwan (April 23, 1934 – December 20, 2015) was an American actress, best known for her roles in Nebraska and Getting On. She also appeared in Parks and Recreation and New Girl.

McEwan was born in Santa Monica, California on April 23, 1934. She studied acting at the Los Angeles City College for one year, then transferred to the University of California at Los Angeles, where she met and married her husband, Nicaraguan gastroenterologist Guillermo McEwan. They moved to Mexico City, where he continued his medical studies and began his career. After returning to California via Temple, Texas, where she received a bachelor's degree from the University of Mary Hardin–Baylor, McEwan obtained a master's degree in Spanish from University of California, Irvine and worked as an interpreter in criminal court.
data.name: Angela McEwan

data.biography: Elke Winkens, née Fischer is an Austrian-German actress. She grew up in the Netherlands in the district Ratheim in Hückelhoven. Because of her father's work the family had moved to the Netherlands and Belgium; for some time she also resided in Africa.
data.name: Elke Winkens

data.overview: Câu chuyện về chú chó Scooby Doo cùng tập đoàn Mystery thực hiện một cuộc phiêu lưu đầy thú vị và nguy hiểm. Họ gồm Fred, Daphne, Velma và Shaggy bổng dưng xảy ra một chút mâu thuẫn nhỏ và đường ai nấy đi nhưng cuối cùng họ cũng xóa bỏ được mâu thuẫn với mọi nỗ lực để đoàn kết lại với nhau một lần nữa nhằm chống lại định mệnh. Họ cùng chiến đấu để phá tan âm mưu đen tối và huyền bí của khu công viên vui chơi giải trí Spooky Island từ những biểu hiện kỳ lạ của các du khách từng đến đây...
data.title: Chú Chó Siêu Quậy

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Michael Badalucco (born December 20, 1954) is an American actor most famous for his role as lawyer Jimmy Berluti on the ABC legal drama The Practice. He won the 1999 Emmy for Best Supporting Actor for his role on the show.

Badalucco, an Italian American, was born in Flatbush, Brooklyn, New York, the son of Jean, a homemaker, and Joe Badalucco, a set dresser, movie set carpenter and property person. His brother is Joseph Badalucco Jr., whose most notable role was Jimmy Altieri in the show The Sopranos.

He attended Xaverian High School in Brooklyn, graduating in 1972. He was the guest speaker at the 2005 commencement. He later attended SUNY New Paltz in New Paltz, New York.

He is married to Brenda Heyob.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Michael Badalucco, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.​
data.name: Michael Badalucco

data.biography:
迈克尔·巴达卢科（Michael Badalucco，1954 年 12 月 20 日出生）是一位美国演员，因在 ABC 法律剧《实践》中饰演律师吉米·贝鲁蒂而闻名。他因在该剧中的角色而获得了 1999 年艾美奖最佳男配角奖。

巴达卢科是意大利裔美国人，出生于纽约布鲁克林的弗拉特布什，是家庭主妇吉恩和布景师、电影布景木匠和财产人乔·巴达卢科的儿子。他的兄弟是小约瑟夫·巴达卢科，他最著名的角色是《黑道家族》中的吉米·阿尔蒂里。

他就读于布鲁克林的 Xaverian 高中，于 1972 年毕业。他是2005年毕业典礼的演讲嘉宾。后来，他就读于纽约新帕尔茨的纽约州立大学新帕尔茨分校。

他与布伦达·海约布（Brenda Heyob）结婚。
data.name: 迈克尔·巴达卢科

data.biography:
邁克爾·巴達盧科（Michael Badalucco，1954 年 12 月 20 日出生）是一位美國演員，因在 ABC 法律劇《實踐》中飾演律師吉米·貝魯蒂而聞名。他因在該劇中的角色而獲得了 1999 年艾美獎最佳男配角獎。

巴達盧科是義大利裔美國人，出生於紐約布魯克林的弗拉特布什，是家庭主婦吉恩和佈景師、電影佈景木匠和財產人喬·巴達盧科的兒子。他的兄弟是小約瑟夫·巴達盧科，他最著名的角色是《黑道家族》中的吉米·阿爾蒂裏。

他就讀於布魯克林的 Xaverian 高中，於 1972 年畢業。他是 2005 年畢業典禮的演講嘉賓。後來，他就讀於紐約新帕爾茨的紐約州立大學新帕爾茨分校。

他與布倫達·海約布（Brenda Heyob）結婚。
data.name: 邁克爾·巴達盧科

data.biography:
Vinod Khanna (6 October 1946 – 27 April 2017) was an Indian actor and producer of Bollywood films. He was the recipient of 2 Filmfare awards. He was also an active politician. He was the sitting MP from Gurdaspur (between 1998-2009 and 2014-2017). He had advanced cancer of the bladder.

Vinod Khanna acted in lead roles in many superhit films and is best remembered for his performance in films like Mere Apne, Mera Gaon Mera Desh, Gaddaar (1973 film), Jail Yatra, Imtihaan, Muqaddar Ka Sikandar, Inkaar, Kuchhe Dhaage, Amar Akbar Anthony, Rajput, Qurbani, Kudrat, Dayavan, Kaarnama, Suryaa: An Awakening and Jurm.

After making his debut in 1968, Khanna first acted in small second lead roles or negative roles. His angry young man role in the movie Mere Apne, his negative role as the main villain in the superhit movie Mera Gaon Mera Desh and his role in the crtically acclaimed movie Achanak based on K. M. Nanavati v. State of Maharashtra, as the military officer turned fugitive.

In 1982, at the peak of his film career, Khanna temporarily quit the film industry to follow his spiritual guru Osho Rajneesh. After a 5 year hiatus, he returned to the Hindi film industry giving two back to back hit films Insaaf and Satyamev Jayate.

Khanna is popularly hailed as one of the most handsome lead actors ever in Bollywood.
data.name: Vinod Khanna

data.biography:
Cooper Barnes is known for playing Captain Man on Nickelodeon's Henry Danger and Danger Force. He also guest-starred on numerous other series such as "Jessie," "Kickin' It," "Cold Case," "Suburgatory," and "Switched at Birth."

Born in Sheffield, England, United Kingdom, Cooper was raised in a small suburb in Michigan, United States. He graduated from Northville High School in 1997. He began his career as an actor in 2001 when he appeared in a film called "Digging with Earnest." He is the founding member of the sketch comedy troupe Frog Island, a recurring sketch player on "Conan," and has starred as Deputy Sam Byron in "Defending Santa." He voiced two characters in "Escape from Planet Earth." He has been married to Liz Stewart since October 3, 2015.
data.name: Cooper Barnes

data.biography:
Yoshi Oïda (笈田ヨシ, Oida Yoshi?) est un acteur et metteur en scène et auteur japonais, né en 1933 à Kōbe (Japon).

Yoshi Oida joue au Japon depuis 1953, à la télévision, au cinéma et au théâtre contemporain.

Il arrive en France en 1968 pour travailler avec Peter Brook. En 1970, il entre au Centre International de Recherche Théâtrale (CIRT) fondé par Peter Brook et il participe ensuite à ses plus célèbres spectacles au Théâtre des Bouffes du Nord comme Les iks, La Conférence des oiseaux, Le Mahabharata, La Tempête ou encore L'homme qui.

Il joue aussi au cinéma pour Peter Greenaway (The Pillow Book) et écrit trois ouvrages théoriques sur le théâtre qui sont traduits en plusieurs langues : L’Acteur flottant, L’Acteur invisible et L'Acteur rusé.

À partir de 1975, parallèlement à son métier de comédien, Yoshi Oida met aussi en scène du théâtre, des opéras et de la danse (Fin de partie de Beckett, Les Bonnes de Jean Genet, Nabucco de Verdi, Don Giovanni de Mozart, etc).

Dans le livre L’Acteur flottant , Yoshi Oida écrit son expérience de comédien avec Peter Brook pendant les années 1968 jusqu'en 1988.

Dans L’Acteur invisible, Yoshi Oida raconte l’expérience de cet acteur japonais, qui voulait savoir quel sont les us et coutumes du théâtre occidental. Il parle aussi et surtout de son expérience avec Peter Brook, le metteur en scène « officiel » de Shakespeare.

Dans L'Acteur rusé, il s'intéresse à la relation entre le métier de comédien et la vie au quotidien. «Qu’ai-je appris sur la scène qui pourrait m’aider à vivre ma vie d’homme ordinaire?» Il écrit également : «Si je montre la lune et que je joue bien, le public ne percevra plus mon existence.»

data.biography: Agnes Elisabet Hilden Kittelsen is a Norwegian actress. She is known from the role as Tikken Manus in the film Max Manus (2008) and the role as Liv Heyerdahl in Kon-Tiki (2012). In recent times, she is best known for the show Exit (2019-2021), and the HBO series Beforeigners.
data.name: Agnes Kittelsen

data.biography:
Agnes Kittelsen (født 20. maj 1980, Vågsbygd, Kristiansand) er en norsk skuespillerinde, kendt blandt andet for sin rolle som Tikken Manus i filmen Max Manus.

Karriere

Kittelsens scenedebut var som amatør i sommeren 2002 i en moderne version af Aladdin opført af skuespillere fra anden klasse på Statens teaterhøgskole. Kittelsen blev skuespiller fra teaterhøjskolen i 2003.

Hendes tv-debut var i 2004 i serien Skolen, og året efter fulgte en birolle i serien Brødrene Dal og mysteriet om Karl XII's gamacher. I efteråret 2005 spillede hun hovedrollen i Alice i en opførelse af Alice i Eventyrland på Den Nationale Scene, og i 2007 medvirkede hun i stykket Kolde produkt, en omskrevet version af Ibsens Et dukkehjem. I 2008 spillede hun en central rolle i den norske film Max Manus, og modtog i august 2009 Amanda-prisen for bedste kvindelige birolle.

Kittelsen har også haft roller i TV 2-serien Dag, filmen Sygt glad og stykket Trollbyen.

Kittelsen har i flere år spillet rollen som den smukke Unn den Fagre i musicalen "Herøyspelet Kongens Ring".
data.name: Agnes Kittelsen

data.biography:
陈美诗（Macy Chan），1981年2月22日出生于香港，中国香港女演员、歌手，中国香港地区女子音乐组合女生宿舍成员之一。

　　2002年，出演电视剧《沙滩．排球．梳乎厘》。2004年，以组合女生宿舍正式出道，发行专辑《Life Is Beautiful》，同年出演电视剧《女子刑侦学院》饰演美思。2006年，出演喜剧爱情类电影《得闲饮茶》饰演诗诗[1] 。2007年，加入无线电视成为旗下艺人，在无线收费电视娱乐新闻台担任主持。2008年出演电视剧《法证先锋II》饰演Formula，同年发行专辑《燃烧国度201》[2] 。2009年7月，出演古装喜剧《王老虎抢亲》饰演施梦露[3] 。2012年，出演电视剧《回到三国》饰演Macy 。2013年，出演电视剧《女警爱作战》饰演顺太太 。
data.name: 陈美诗

data.biography:
陳美詩（Macy Chan），1981 年 2 月 22 日出生於香港，香港女演員、歌手，香港地區女子音樂組合女生宿捨成員之一。

2002 年，出演電視劇《沙灘．排球．梳乎釐》。2004 年，以組合女生宿捨正式出道，髮行專輯《Life Is Beautiful》，同年出演電視劇《女子刑偵學院》飾演美思。2006 年，出演喜劇愛情類電影《得閒飲茶》飾演詩詩。2007 年，加入無線電視成為旗下藝人，在無線收費電視娛樂新聞颱擔任主持。2008 年出演電視劇《法證先鋒 II》飾演 Formula，同年髮行專輯《燃燒國度 201》。2009 年 7 月，出演古裝喜劇《王老虎搶親》飾演施夢露。2012 年，出演電視劇《回到三國》飾演 Macy。2013 年，出演電視劇《女警愛作戰》飾演順太太。
data.name: 陳美詩

data.biography: Ross Bagdasarian Jr. was born on October 25, 1949 in Los Angeles, California, USA as Ross Dickran Bagdasarian. He is an actor and producer, known for Alvinnn!!! And the Chipmunks (2015), Alvin & the Chipmunks (1983) and A Chipmunk Christmas (1981). He has been married to Janice Karman since September 27, 1980. They have two children.
data.name: Ross Bagdasarian, Jr.

data.biography:
Lucie Boujenah est née le 31 juillet 1990 à Paris. Elle a un frère et une sœur.

Elle est la nièce de Michel Boujenah et la cousine de Laura Boujenah.

Lucie Boujenah commence sa carrière à la télévision en 2010 avec un épisode de R.I.S Police scientifique.

Elle commence à se faire connaître l'année suivante en incarnant Jenna, dans la série Soda.

Elle fait ses premiers pas au cinéma en 2013 avec un petit rôle dans 20 ans d'écart de David Moreau. On peut ensuite la retrouver dans 24 jours, la vérité sur l'affaire Ilan Halimi d'Alexandre Arcady.

En 2016, elle joue dans Five d'Igor Gotesman et lors d'un épisode des séries Alice Nevers et Cassandre. Deux plus tard, elle trouve un petit rôle dans Les Chatouilles d'Andréa Bescond et Éric Métayer.

En 2019, elle tourne dans Edmond d'Alexis Michalik et la série Marianne, diffusée sur Netflix.

Woo Do Hwan is a South Korean actor managed by KEYEAST. He is a former student at Dankook University in the Faculty of Performing Arts, Theater Major.

He debuted in 2011 with an appearance in the drama "Come, Come, Absolutely Come". His first lead role came in the 2017 series"Save Me".

He received the Best New Actor award at the 2017 KBS Drama Awards for his role in the series "Mad Dog". In 2018, at the MBC Drama Awards, he received an "Excellence Award" in the category "Actor in a Monday-Tuesday Drama" for his role in "Tempted".

He enlisted for his mandatory military service on July 6th, 2020, and was discharged on January 5th, 2022.

On July 10, 2023 it was announced that he has signed an exclusive contract with H& Entertainment after parting ways with KeyEast.
data.name: Woo Do-hwan

data.biography: 2016年，禹棹奂出演了KBS爱情喜剧《住在我家的男人》，正式出道；同年，出演犯罪动作片《Master》，在片中饰演陈会长的手下Snapback一角，并凭借该片获得了第53届韩国百想艺术大赏电影部门男子新人奖的提名。2017年8月5日，主演的OCN恐怖悬疑剧《救救我》播出；同年，他还主演了KBS刑侦剧《Mad Dog》。
data.name: 禹棹焕

data.biography:
Woo Do Hwan é um ator sul-coreano administrado pela KEYEAST. Ele é um ex-aluno da Universidade Dankook na Faculdade de Artes Cênicas, Especialização em Teatro.

Ele estreou em 2011 com uma participação no drama 'Come, Come, Absolutely Come'. Seu primeiro papel principal veio na série 'Save Me' de 2017.

Ele recebeu o prêmio de Melhor Novo Ator no KBS Drama Awards 2017 por seu papel na série 'Mad Dog'. Em 2018, no MBC Drama Awards, ele recebeu o 'Prêmio de Excelência' na categoria 'Ator em Drama de Segunda a Terça' por seu papel em 'Tempted'.

Alistou-se para o serviço militar obrigatório em 6 de julho de 2020 e recebeu alta em 5 de janeiro de 2022.

Em 10 de julho de 2023 foi anunciado que ele assinou um contrato exclusivo com a H& Entertainment após se separar da KeyEast.

Ο Γου Ντο-χουάν (Woo Do-hwan) είναι ένας Νοτιοκορεάτης ηθοποιός. Είναι περισσότερο γνωστός για τους ρόλους του στα τηλεοπτικά δράματα Save Me (2017), Mad Dog (2017), Tempted (2018), My Country: The New Age (2019), The King: Eternal Monarch (2020), και Bloodhounds (2023). Εμφανίστηκε επίσης στην ταινία The Divine Fury (2019).

data.biography:
Nana Visitor (born Nana Tucker; July 26, 1957) is an American actress, known for playing Kira Nerys in the television series Star Trek: Deep Space Nine and Jean Ritter in the television series Wildfire. Nana Tucker was born July 26, 1957 in New York City,the daughter of Nenette Charisse, a ballet teacher, and Robert Tucker, a choreographer; she is a niece of actress/dancer Cyd Charisse.

Visitor became pregnant by her Deep Space Nine co-star Alexander Siddig (also known as Siddig el-Fadil) in 1996, and the pregnancy was incorporated into a DS9 storyline, beginning in the fourth season episode "Body Parts",which premiered in June 1996. She gave birth to her son, Django El Tahir El Siddig, during production of the episode "The Assignment", though her character would remain pregnant until the fifth season episode "The Begotten", which premiered in January 1997. Visitor and Siddig married in June 1997 and divorced in April 2001.

In early 2002, Visitor became engaged to Matthew Rimmer, company manager for the musical Chicago, and they wed in April 2003.
data.name: Nana Visitor

data.biography:
Nana Visitor (* 26. Juli 1957 in New York City als Nana Tucker) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin, bekannt durch ihre Rolle als Kira Nerys in der Fernsehserie Star Trek: Deep Space Nine.

Ihr Filmdebüt hatte Visitor in Hexensabbat (The Sentinel) mit Ava Gardner. Es folgte eine längere Rolle in der Daily-Soap Ryan’s Hope sowie weitere Auftritte in verschiedenen Fernsehserien. In der kurzlebigen Sitcom Working Girl spielte Visitor 1990 als Bryn Newhouse in allen zwölf Folgen neben der damals noch unbekannteren Sandra Bullock, die Serie basierte auf dem Film Die Waffen der Frauen

1993 erhielt Visitor die Rolle der Kira Nerys in Star Trek: Deep Space Nine (DS9). Im Jahr 2001, nach dem Ende von DS9, spielte Visitor in dem mit einem Tony Award ausgezeichneten Broadway-Stück Chicago die Roxie Hart und in sechs Folgen der Fernsehserie Dark Angel die Madame X alias Dr. Elizabeth Renfro. In der Serie Wildfire spielte sie von 2005 bis 2008 als Jean Ritter eine der Hauptfiguren.

Nana Visitor (ur. Nana Tucker 26 lipca 1957) to amerykańska aktorka, znana z roli Kiry Nerys w serialu Star Trek: Deep Space Nine i Jean Ritter w serialu Wildfire. Nana Tucker urodziła się 26 lipca 1957 w Nowy Jork, córka nauczycielki baletu Nenette Charisse i choreografa Roberta Tuckera; jest siostrzenicą aktorki/tancerki Cyda Charisse.

Gość zaszła w ciążę ze swoim partnerem Deep Space Nine, Alexander Siddig (znany również jako Siddig el-Fadil) w 1996 roku, a ciąża została włączona do fabuły DS9, począwszy od odcinka czwartego sezonu „Body Parts”, który miał premierę w czerwcu 1996. Urodziła syna, Django El Tahira El Siddiga, podczas produkcji odcinka „The Assignment”, choć jej postać pozostała w ciąży do piątego odcinka sezonu „The Begotten”, który miał premierę w styczniu 1997 roku. ożenił się w czerwcu 1997 r. i rozwiódł się w kwietniu 2001 r.

Nana Tucker, sahne adıyla Nana Visitor, 26 Temmuz 1957 tarihinde New York, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Sanatın içine doğan Visitor, ünlü koreograf Robert Tucker ve bale eğitmeni Nenette Charisse'in kızıdır; ayrıca Hollywood'un efsanevi dansçısı Cyd Charisse'in yeğenidir. Bu güçlü genetik mirasla çocukluğunda dansa yönelen oyuncu, kariyerine Broadway sahnelerinde "My One and Only" gibi müzikallerde başladı. 1970'lerin sonunda sinema ve televizyona geçiş yaptı, "The Sentinel" (1977) filmiyle beyazperdeye adım attı ve 80'ler boyunca "MacGyver", "Matlock", "Knight Rider" gibi dönemin popüler dizilerinde konuk oyuncu olarak yer alarak tecrübe kazandı.

Visitor'ı dünya çapında bir bilimkurgu ikonuna dönüştüren ve kariyerinin en tanımlayıcı performansı, 1993-1999 yılları arasında yayınlanan "Star Trek: Deep Space Nine" dizisindeki Binbaşı (daha sonra Albay) Kira Nerys rolüdür. İşgal altındaki gezegeni Bajor için savaşan eski bir direnişçi ve istasyonun ikinci komutanı olan bu karakter, sert mizacı, savaşçı ruhu ve duygusal derinliğiyle "Star Trek" evreninin en güçlü kadın figürlerinden biri olarak kabul edilir. Visitor, bu rolü yedi sezon boyunca başarıyla sürdürdü. Dizi çekimleri sırasında rol arkadaşı Alexander Siddig (Dr. Julian Bashir) ile evlendi (1997-2001) ve hamileliği, senaryoya karakterinin taşıyıcı anne olması şeklinde entegre edildi. Çiftin Django adında bir oğlu vardır.

"Star Trek" sonrası dönemde televizyon kariyerine hız kesmeden devam eden Visitor, James Cameron'ın yapımcısı olduğu "Dark Angel" (2001) dizisinde kötü karakter Madam X (Dr. Elizabeth Renfro) rolüyle ve "Wildfire" (2005-2008) dizisinde Jean Ritter karakteriyle ekranlarda boy gösterdi. Sinemada ise korku türünün en bilinen serilerinden "13. Cuma" (Friday the 13th) filminin 2009 yapımı yeniden çevriminde kritik bir rol üstlendi. İkonik katil Jason Voorhees'in annesi ve hikayenin orijinal katili olan Pamela Voorhees'i canlandırarak ürkütücü bir performans sergiledi.

Sahne köklerine her zaman bağlı kalan oyuncu, Broadway'de "Chicago" müzikalinde Roxie Hart rolünü üstlenerek dans ve şan yeteneğini sergilemeye devam etti. Seslendirme sanatçısı olarak "Family Guy" gibi yapımlarda yer aldı ve son yıllarda "Star Trek: Lower Decks" animasyonunda Kira Nerys karakterini tekrar seslendirerek hayranlarına sürpriz yaptı. Adına "26733 Nanavisitor" isimli bir asteroit verilen sanatçı, 2003 yılından beri Matthew Rimmer ile evlidir.

林逸欣（Shara Lin），1985年11月5日出生于台湾省台南市，中国台湾流行乐女歌手、影视演员、主持人。

2003年，林逸欣因成为奇美管弦乐团成员而出道演艺圈。2007年，她开始主持台湾中天电视台旅游节目《台湾脚逛大陆》。2009年，林逸欣出演了个人首部电影作品《夏天协奏曲》。2012年，她发行了首张个人全创作专辑《作对》 [1]  。2014年，林逸欣出演了爱情剧《真爱配方》 [2]  。2015年，她开始主持旅行节目《如影随行》。

林逸欣（Shara Lin），1985 年 11 月 5 日出生於台灣台南市，台灣流行樂女歌手、影視演員、主持人。

2003 年，林逸欣因成為奇美管絃樂團成員而出道演藝圈。2007 年，她開始主持台灣中天電視台旅遊節目《台灣腳逛大陸》。2009 年，林逸欣出演了個人首部電影作品《夏天協奏曲》。2012 年，她發行了首張個人全創作專輯《作對》 。2014 年，林逸欣出演了愛情劇《真愛配方》 。2015 年，她開始主持旅行節目《如影隨行》。
data.name: 林逸欣

data.overview: Trên giang hồ đột nhiên xảy ra hai chuyện lớn. Chuyện thứ nhất, minh chủ võ lâm Giang Thanh Lưu tẩu hỏa nhập ma, mất hết võ công. Chuyện thứ hai, ma đầu Bạc Dã Cảnh Hành bị Giang gia giam giữ hơn mười năm đã bỏ trốn. Vài ngày sau, một cô gái nhuyễn hương ôn ngọc bị nhốt trong hộp gấm được đưa đến tay Giang Thanh Lưu, hắn cảm thấy không ổn chút nào, bởi vì người nằm trong hộp lại chính là Bạc Dã Cảnh Hành, người đã đánh hắn bị thương rồi bỏ trốn. Vì muốn che đậy chuyện đại ma đầu mà Giang gia giam giữ suốt nhiều năm chỉ là một cô gái bình thường, Giang Thanh Lưu đành phải sắp xếp cho nàng ở trong nhà mình để giám sát. Chân tướng dần dần hé lộ, hung thủ đồ sát toàn bộ sư môn của Bạc Dã Cảnh Hành nhiều năm trước mà nàng quyết tâm truy tìm khó lòng thoát khỏi liên quan tới Giang gia.

data.biography: Patricia "Patti" D'Arbanville (born May 25, 1951) is an American actress and former model, perhaps best known for her appearance in Andy Warhol movies in the 1970s. She was in a relationship with singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, inspiring his song "Lady D'Arbanville" in 1970. Patti has been married 3 times, including to French actor Roger Miremont from 1975-1980, during the years she lived and acted in France. She was married to Steve Curry from 1980-1981, and was then a relationship with actor Don Johnson from 1981-1986, with whom he shares a son, Jesse Johnson. She was married to married to former New York City firefighter Terry Quinn from 1993 to 2002, and shares 3 children with Terry. Patti continues to make TV appearances and is often interviewed about her life, especially in the 1970s, performing with Warhol and being in relationships with a number of popular musicians.
data.name: Patti D'Arbanville

data.biography:
Patti D'Arbanville (née Patricia d'Arbanville) est une actrice américaine née le 25 mai 1951 à New York.

Patti d'Arbanville commence sa carrière à 17 ans, sous la direction de Paul Morrissey et d'Andy Warhol dans le film Flesh.

De 1968 à 1970, elle est la petite amie du chanteur Cat Stevens, et lui inspire Lady d'Arbanville et Wild World1.

Francophone et mariée avec l'acteur français Roger Miremont à cette époque, elle fait quelques films en France, comme La Maison de Gérard Brach avec Michel Simon et Paul Préboist, ou Sois belle et tais-toi de Delphine Seyrig.

Elle joue dans des comédies à succès, Quoi, vous ne voulez pas ? (1979, titre original : The Main Event)2 où elle apparait aux côtés de Barbra Streisand, Ryan O'Neal, Kristine DeBell, et Vous brillez donc oui! (1981), aux côtés de Chevy Chase.

Dans les années 1980, elle participe à de nombreuses séries TV, Drôles de dames, Arabesque, Deux flics à Miami.

Au cinéma, elle joue dans le film dramatique Fresh Horses (1988), et aux côtés de Robert De Niro et Wesley Snipes dans le thriller The Fan (1996).

De 1994 à 1997, elle tient le rôle du lieutenant Virginia Cooper dans la série New York Undercover, mais le casting de la série ayant été profondément modifié pour la quatrième et dernière saison, son rôle n'a pas été reconduit. De 1998 à 2000, Patti d'Arbanville a joué dans plusieurs épisodes de la série télévisée Guiding Light.

Elle a été nommée en 2000 pour son rôle dans le « soap opera » Digest Award. De 1999 à 2005, on l'a également vue dans la série New York 911, où elle incarne la mère de « Bosco ».

Elle a été mariée trois fois : la première avec l'acteur français Roger Miremont, de 1975 à 1980, la seconde avec Steve Curry et la troisième, de 1993 à 2000, avec Terry Quinn de qui elle a eu trois enfants. Avec l'acteur Don Johnson, elle a également eu un fils Jesse Wayne Johnson, né le 7 décembre 1982 dans le Colorado, également devenu acteur.

En 1970, Patti d'Arbanville entretient une liaison avec le chanteur Cat Stevens. C'est pour elle que ce dernier écrit la célèbre chanson My Lady D'Arbanville. À la suite de leur rupture, il écrira également l'année suivante un autre de ses grands succès, Wild World.

Patricia „Patti” D'Arbanville (ur. 25 maja 1951) jest amerykańską aktorką i byłą modelką, prawdopodobnie najbardziej znaną z występów w filmach Andy'ego Warhola w latach 70. Była w związku z piosenkarzem i autorem tekstów Catem Stevensem, co zainspirowało go do napisania piosenki „Lady D'Arbanville” w 1970 roku. Patti była trzykrotnie zamężna, w tym z francuskim aktorem Rogerem Miremontem w latach 1975-1980, w latach, gdy mieszkała i grała we Francji. Była żoną Steve'a Curry'ego w latach 1980-1981, a następnie była w związku z aktorem Donem Johnsonem w latach 1981-1986, z którym ma syna, Jessego Johnsona. Była żoną byłego strażaka z Nowego Jorku Terry'ego Quinna w latach 1993-2002 i ma 3 dzieci z Terrym. Patti nadal pojawia się w telewizji i często udziela wywiadów na temat swojego życia, zwłaszcza z lat 70., kiedy występowała z Warholem i utrzymywała kontakty z wieloma popularnymi muzykami.

Luke Islam shot to national attention in 2019 when he competed on Season 14 of NBC's hit televised talent show competition, "America's Got Talent." His rendition of "She Used to Be Mine" from the Broadway musical Waitress impressed judge Julianne Hough so much that she pressed the Golden Buzzer, sending him straight to the Quarterfinals as well as viral acclaim. Although he was eliminated from the semifinals of America's Got Talent, Luke was invited back the next month to compete again on Season 2 of their beloved spin-off "America's Got Talent: The Champions." The show premiered on NBC in January of 2020. Following his success on AGT, Islam made his professional acting debut in the series regular role of Jaden 'Koob' Koobler on the sports comedy-drama television series, The Mighty Ducks: Game Changers. The series premiered on Disney+ on March 26, 2021. In August 2021, it was renewed for a second season which premiered on September 28, 2022. In addition, Islam starred in the coming-of-age comedy-drama film, 13: The Musical. After principal photography in the Summer 2021 was complete, the movie spent a year in post-production & premiered on Netflix in August of 2022. 3 months later, Islam made his solo performance debut at NYC's iconic 54 Below on November 4, 2022. After selling out the first concert, Luke was invited back to perform an encore show the next month. Most recently, playing the supporting role of Christopher L, Islam was featured in the critics' pick mockumentary comedy film, Theater Camp. After premiering in competition at Sundance Film Festival 2023, it was distributed nationwide to over 500 select theaters by Searchlight Pictures on July 14, 2023 and has grossed almost $3,000,000 at the box office. While not being away filming, Luke lends his talents in support of many different charitable organizations such as UNICEF, the Entertainment Community Fund, and You Gotta Believe. In addition, Luke loves nothing more than being an audience member at any Broadway show he can attend.
data.name: Luke Islam

data.overview:
Thiên Long Bát Bộ hay còn gọi là Lục Mạch Thần Kiếm. Được tái bản lại trên kênh truyền hình Trung Quốc năm 2003

Câu chuyện xoay quanh mối quan hệ phức tạp giữa nhiều nhân vật đến từ nhiều nước

và môn phái khác nhau: Tiêu Phong, Đoàn Dự, Hư Trúc. Với tác phẩm này, Kim Dung muốn nói đến mối quan hệ nhân - quả giữa chính bản thân các nhân vật với gia đình, xã hội, dân tộc, đất nước. Chuyện xảy ra vào thời Bắc Tống và cũng bao gồm các nước Đại Lý, Khiết Đan, Thổ Phồn và Tây Hạ.

data.biography:
高虎，1974年4月25日出生于山东省青岛市，中国内地男演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系。

1996年出演第一部电视剧《北京夏天》；2001年因主演《乱世英雄吕不韦》而崭露头角；2003年因出演《天龙八部》中虚竹一角而获得关注；2007年主演古装武侠剧《碧血剑》和《雪山飞狐》；2008年获得第一届手机报《电影爱好者》“金π奖”最喜爱的数字电影演员奖；2010年出演《水浒传》中杨志；2011年参演电影《金陵十三钗》；2012年参演电影《大上海》。 2013年参演电视剧《龙门飞甲》和电影《澳门风云》。
data.name: 高虎
